session_info.project: Advanced Machine Learning Mid-Semester Part A

selected_paper.title: Dual coordinate descent methods for logistic regression and maximum entropy models

interaction_summary.objective: Filter papers based on strict CORE A* (2009-2012) criteria and SVM/GMM/ARIMA constraints.
interaction_summary.outcome: Identified 'Dual coordinate descent methods for logistic regression and maximum entropy models' as a valid choice not in the exclusion list.
Verified the existence of Algorithm 4 (pseudocode), public datasets (RCV1, news20), and CPU-based execution suitability.
Provided exact strings for the form and drafted a justification highlighting methodological depth and reproducibility.
Generated JSON structure for LLM usage verification.

llm_disclosure: This interaction assisted the student in verifying paper constraints, ensuring the venue met CORE A* standards, and confirming the methodological nature of the contribution to satisfy Mid-Sem Part A requirements.
